form.formComment: Resuming after three months off the scene. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into seventh behind Narobi at Gawler over 2070m in a NR 46 to 51 on January 12 at $8.50. Has trialled well and the ace draw could see a good return.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resuming after three months off the scene. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into seventh behind Narobi at Gawler over 2070m in a NR 46 to 51 on January 12 at $8.50. Has trialled well and the ace draw could see a good return.

form.formComment: Won three starts back at this track over 1800m NR 44 to 49 on March 28. Last start was well back in the run when 7th (Fr4) over 1800m after being wide early at this track beaten 30 m by Signature Look (2:11.10) in NR 48 to 55 on April 11 at $61. Draws for a strong showing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won three starts back at this track over 1800m NR 44 to 49 on March 28. Last start was well back in the run when 7th (Fr4) over 1800m after being wide early at this track beaten 30 m by Signature Look (2:11.10) in NR 48 to 55 on April 11 at $61. Draws for a strong showing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Forcing Buzz Bomb wider in the back straight on the first occasion.

form.formComment: Last start a big 4 m win (Fr2) at this track (2:12.80) beating Tommy Mach in NR 42 to 47 on April 11 at $4.80. May measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start a big 4 m win (Fr2) at this track (2:12.80) beating Tommy Mach in NR 42 to 47 on April 11 at $4.80. May measure up again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Led and yielded ground to be beaten 61.2m into tenth placing.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into ninth behind Signature Look at this track over 1800m in a NR 48 to 55 on April 11 at $41. Raced better the start before that where he posted a big 6 m win as favourite (Fr1) at this track (2:45.10) beating Didmeselfamischief in NR 44 to 49 on April 4 at $2 at the bell was 4th-6.2. Take beating.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start was well beaten into ninth behind Signature Look at this track over 1800m in a NR 48 to 55 on April 11 at $41. Raced better the start before that where he posted a big 6 m win as favourite (Fr1) at this track (2:45.10) beating Didmeselfamischief in NR 44 to 49 on April 4 at $2 at the bell was 4th-6.2. Take beating.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, was well back in the run when 5th (Fr5) over 1609m at Port Pirie was 6th-17 at the bell, beaten 19 m by Lincs Poor Boy (1:56.20) in NR 47 to 54 on March 31 at $81. Before that was driven from back in the field when 5th (Fr4) over 1800m at this track, beaten 40 m by Narobi (2:14.20) in NR up to 54 on February 21 at $41. Others make more appeal.

Before that was driven from back in the field when 5th (Fr4) over 1800m at this track, beaten 40 m by Narobi (2:14.20) in NR up to 54 on February 21 at $41. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Resumes. At the latest first-up run 6th (Sr2) over 1710m at Goulburn, beaten 50 m by Niki Nah Nah (2:04.00) in NR up to 63 on March 31 2025 at $41. Will be better for the hitout.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resumes. At the latest first-up run 6th (Sr2) over 1710m at Goulburn, beaten 50 m by Niki Nah Nah (2:04.00) in NR up to 63 on March 31 2025 at $41. Will be better for the hitout.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Leaving 500m became unbalanced and broke stride.
Checked when avoiding the galloping Mirador Lass passing the 1950m.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 10th (Fr4) over 1800m at this track, beaten 45 m by Letsstartinheaven (2:09.80) in NR 56 to 64 on April 11 at $151. Before that, 5th (Fr4) over 1800m at this track was 8th-13.2 at the bell, beaten 16 m by Deuce Coupe (2:10.10) in NR 50 to 59 on April 4 at $28.70. Place best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted out under pressure in the final straight.
Broke gait free of interference as the field raced through the first turn.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, was well back in the run when 8th (Fr2) over 1800m after showing early speed at this track, beaten 60 m by Alora (2:10.90) in NR 55 to 65 on February 14 at $61. Before that 6th (Fr2) over 1800m at this track beaten 8 m by Kathys Free (2:10.70) in NR 58 to 66 on February 10 at $34. Prefer others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Gave ground from the 400m to eventually be beaten 60.0m.
Hung out in the score up.
Had a tendency to hang out during various stages of the event.
Hung out when the start was effected.
